trait.name: Heat-Sink Plating
entries: When the forge-hammer takes fire damage, it reduces the damage by 5 (to a minimum of 0).

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The forge-hammer makes two Hammer attacks.

action.name: Hammer
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}13 ({@damage 2d6 + 6}) bludgeoning damage plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) fire damage.

action.name: Anvil Lock (Recharge 6)
entries: One creature the forge-hammer can see within 5 feet must succeed on a {@dc 15} Strength saving throw or be {@condition grappled} (escape {@dc 15}). Until the grapple ends, the target is {@condition restrained}. The forge-hammer can grapple only one creature at a time.
